description:
Pre-work for the value-rep arc. Subsequent atoms produce no stdout change — they change HOW code is generated. The matrix must be able to assert on dump output so each atom can prove itself observably.

## Surface

```
# expect_clif_contains: fn add1: iadd
# expect_clif_excludes: fn add1: icmp_imm
```

Per-fn substring assertions over `fz dump --emit clif`. Header-key gated in fixture header. BLESS=1 appends observed CLIF substrings to expectations.

## Adds

  - tests/fixture_matrix.rs: parse expect_clif_* keys, shell `fz dump --emit clif --fn <name>`, assert substring matches.
  - One demo fixture using the new keys to anchor the contract.

## Kills

  Nothing. Pure additive — gated by header keys, no fixture without them is affected.

## Acceptance

  - A fixture declaring `expect_clif_contains: iadd` + `expect_clif_excludes: icmp_imm` passes when the dump matches and fails when it doesn't.
  - BLESS=1 round-trips: re-running with BLESS appends observed substrings; subsequent runs without BLESS pass.
  - All existing fixtures still green.
title: VR.0: fixture-matrix CLIF assertion extension
